task: deals-api-integration Phase 3 (DEAL-003 / #24) — server-authoritative deal apply at placement + orders.deal_id migration + mobile apply flow
riskClasses: schema/data migration or destructive data mutation
public API or external contract changes
why: Rewrites the POST /orders placement transaction to compute and persist a real money discount from an applied deal, adds an orders.deal_id schema migration, and changes the public POST /orders contract. 3 of 6 high-risk classes — money math, atomicity, complex-type rejection, and usage-limit race safety must all hold before finalize.

constraints.server-authority-over-money: createOrderSchema accepts ONLY dealId (uuid). No client-sent discount amount or eligibility result is ever trusted. Discount computed server-side from the raw deals.discount_value.
constraints.discount-clamp: computeDealDiscountCents applies both clamps: Math.max(0, Math.min(computed, subtotalCents)) — never negative, never exceeds subtotal.
constraints.row-lock: deals row is SELECT ... FOR UPDATE'd BEFORE reading usage counts, inside the transaction, to serialize concurrent same-deal placements against usage limits.
constraints.complex-type-reject: buy_one_take_one/free_item/free_upgrade/bundle are rejected with 400 BEFORE any discount computation — no deal_id persisted with a guessed/zero discount.
constraints.atomicity: every discount/eligibility rejection throws OrderError(400) inside the transaction, rolling back the whole placement — zero order/order_items rows written.
constraints.fk-no-action: orders.deal_id is a nullable uuid FK REFERENCES deals(id) with NO explicit onDelete (Postgres default NO ACTION) — matches user_id/branch_id precedent.
constraints.migration-additive: 0004 adds a nullable column + FK constraint only; no data backfill; existing rows get NULL.

autoStopConditions: docker compose / local Postgres unavailable -> automated gate cannot run -> verification.json cannot be produced -> phase BLOCKED for finalize (code may be written, not marked VERIFIED).
any security/correctness gate (money math, atomicity, complex-type rejection, row lock) fails -> STOP and report BLOCKED, do not work around.
